bugs.title: Inability to access account details
bugs.evidence: I can't access the account details. Details right now, but I can connect you to our patient support team.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent's inability to access account details directly contradicts the goal of assisting the patient with the voicemail inquiry, potentially leading to frustration.
bugs.recommendation: Ensure the agent can provide at least some basic information or guidance regarding the voicemail before transferring the call.

overall_notes: The agent handled the call well overall, maintaining a polite and calm demeanor but failed to fulfill the primary goal of resolving the patient's inquiry regarding the voicemail, leading to a partial evaluation.
